# Easy Calculator Nex - Documentation for LLMs

> Fast, free online calculators for work, money, health, and home projects. 90+ tools, instant results, no signup.

## Core Info

- Site: Easy Calculator Nex
- URL: https://easycalculatornex.pro
- Tagline: Smart Calculators for Every Need
- Language: English (US)
- Category: Technology / Online Tools

## Available Calculators (90+)

### Construction & Home
- Paint Calculator, Concrete Calculator, Roofing Calculator, Tile Calculator, Acreage Calculator, Aggregate Calculator

### Business & Ecommerce
- Margin Calculator, Markup Calculator, ROI Calculator, Business Loan Calculator

### Finance & Investment
- Loan Payment Calculator, Mortgage Calculator, Compound Interest Calculator, CAGR Calculator

### Work Time & Payroll
- Hours Calculator, Overtime Calculator, Timesheet Calculator, Salary Calculator

### Health & Fitness
- BMI Calculator, BMR Calculator, Calorie Calculator, Body Fat Calculator, Ideal Weight Calculator, Pregnancy Calculator, Ovulation Calculator, Period Calculator

### Date & Age
- Age Calculator, Date Difference Calculator, Date Add Calculator, Weeks Between Dates Calculator, Day of Week Calculator, Time Duration Calculator

### Math & Conversion
- Percentage Calculator, Length Converter, Weight Converter, Temperature Converter, Speed Converter, Number Base Converter
